hooks.command: cd "${WIKI_ROOT:-$PWD}" && python3 .claude/scripts/export-session.py --trigger sessionend; python3 .claude/scripts/scheduled-maintenance.py --trigger sessionend 2>/dev/null; true

WIKI_DIR="${WIKI_ROOT:-$PWD}"; cd "$WIKI_DIR" && bash .claude/scripts/index-sessions.sh && echo '---' && bash .claude/scripts/recall.sh --recent 3 && python3 .claude/scripts/load-personal-prefs.py 2>/dev/null || true && python3 .claude/scripts/scheduled-maintenance.py --trigger sessionstart 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import json,sys,pathlib,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); root=pathlib.Path(os.environ.get('WIKI_ROOT','.')); (root/'.claude/no-export').touch() if 'this session is confidential' in d.get('prompt','').lower() else None"
